description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named release that can be triggered manually or when a release is published. The workflow should have two jobs: build and publish. The build job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the repository, builds a Python package using build, uploads the package as an artifact, and checks the package metadata. The publish job depends on the build job, runs on ubuntu-latest only when a release is published, downloads the package artifact, and publishes it to PyPI using the PyPI API token from secrets.
